channel.title: culture on /dev/ by Massimiliano Pippi
channel.description: Recent content in culture on /dev/ by Massimiliano Pippi

item.title: What You Do Is Who You Are: How to Create Your Business Culture
item.description: I can’t recall another time when reading a book made me uncomfortable. The book is supposed to teach you how to set up a strong culture in your company but to do so it uses examples from: a controversial military leader, a feudal system well known for its rigid hierarchies, a perpetrator of multiple genocides and last but not least, a prison gang leader. I kinda see the idea behind the book, but the execution is terrible, peaking with the cringey quotes from rap songs at the beginning of each chapter. The book contains great stories and good insights but you have to dig, not sure it was worth it.
